title: MERCY MEDICAL ANGELS - 211info
text: MERCY MEDICAL ANGELS MERCY MEDICAL ANGELS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gas cards, bus tickets, train tickets, and air transportation for patients and medically necessary caregivers traveling to distant medical appointments. 101 W Main Street Suite 1000 Norfolk, VA 23510 Eligibility: Income must be at or below 300% of the federal poverty level Hours: Monday-Thursday 4am-2pm Email (757) 318-9174 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (757) 318-9174 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Must provide personal information, proof of income, appointment verification, and physician information. AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Mercy Transportation Non-Emergency Medical Transportation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
